zh.lifeSummary: Mabel le Furneux是Allen le Furneux的女兒，出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。她和Humphrey le Caile至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mabel le Furneux是Allen le Furneux的女儿，出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特。她和Humphrey le Caile至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Furneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in Normandy called Fourneaux ‘(the) furnaces’, one in Manche, the other in Calvados. Compare   Furnace   and   Furnell  .

variants.name: Furney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Furneaux  . It may sometimes have been confused with   Furness  ; the two names have variants in common (see   Furnace  ).

variants.name: Fornell
meanings: English: variant of Furneaux , or a nickname from Middle English fornel ‘small oven or furnace’.

variants.name: Furnace
meanings: (of Norman origin): sometimes a variant of   Furneaux  .

variants.name: Furnell
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a variant of   Farnell  . Compare   Funnell  .

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Mabel le Furneux was born in Somerset, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Allen le Furneux. She had at least 1 daughter with Humphrey le Caile.
